mapper.select:
SELECT batch_log_id, wh_cd, batch_type, batch_name, start_datetime, end_datetime, status, total_count, success_count, error_count, skip_count, error_message FROM wms.batch_job_log
ORDER BY start_datetime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT batch_log_id, wh_cd, batch_type, batch_name, start_datetime, end_datetime, status, total_count, success_count, error_count, skip_count, error_message FROM wms.batch_job_log WHERE batch_log_id = #{batch_log_id}

SELECT error_log_id, batch_log_id, ref_no, ref_detl_no, error_code, error_message, retry_count, retry_status, ins_datetime FROM wms.batch_error_log WHERE batch_log_id = #{batch_log_id} ORDER BY error_log_id ASC
